arts.ttl: ‘I played for Liverpool and would've left for Real Madrid in a heartbeat – don’t begrudge Trent'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is fast approaching the final few months of his contract at Liverpool, and Stan Collymore believes the right-back would be well within his rights to move to Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Liverpool could be without four players for Wolves as new injury concern emerges
arts.sum: Arne Slot is waiting for an update on several of his Liverpool players ahead of the Premier League clash against Wolves

arts.ttl: I ruined Steven Gerrard's farewell from Liverpool after being bombed out of squad
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Steven Gerrard's time at Liverpool could have ended with FA Cup glory, but Shay Given helped inflict a surprise defeat on the Reds with Aston Villa at Wembley Stadium which ruined those hopes

arts.ttl: Arne Slot compares Mo Salah to Cristiano Ronaldo as he notices obvious similarity
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has heaped praise on Mo Salah and compared him to Cristiano Ronaldo, as well as singling out the role of the Egyptian star's team-mate Virgil van Dijk

arts.ttl: Arsene Wenger names Liverpool star 'favourite' whilst Arsenal hero backs down from title challenge
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and rumours as Arsene Wenger raves about Mohamed Salah whilst Arsenal spark next title race twist

arts.ttl: I would've left Liverpool for Real Madrid in a heartbeat – you can't begrudge Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has not shaken the links with a move to Real Madrid with his contract still set to expire at the end of the season, and Liverpool face the prospect of losing him for nothing

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Wolves: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool will be without Curtis Jones, Joe Gomez and possibly Cody Gakpo against Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister 'fight' praised as Liverpool midfielder stands up for Arne Slot
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister was an impressive performer for Liverpool in the Goodison derby against Everton on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Pep Guardiola goads Arne Slot with title claim as Mo Salah agent drops hint
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Wolves to Anfield this Sunday in a crucial game for their title challenge, though the Reds will have Arne Slot in the dugout despite his red card against Everton last time out

arts.ttl: Why Merseyside derby mayhem could be a blessing in disguise for Liverpool in their quest for Premier League title, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: What happened to Liverpool at the end of Wednesday night's stormy Merseyside derby will be a blessing. Everything has gone right for Arne Slot's team this season.
